Simple Process

How It Works

Selling your home to us is simple, fast and completely stress free. Three easy steps and you are done.

01

Call or Text Us

Reach out to us at (404) 490-1133. Tell us a little about your property. No obligation, no pressure, just a conversation.

02

Get Your Cash Offer

We evaluate your home and present a fair all cash offer within 24 hours. No repairs required, no cleaning, no showings.

03

Close and Get Paid

You choose the closing date. We can close in as little as 7 days. Walk away with cash in hand and peace of mind.

Who We Help

We Understand Difficult Situations

Life does not always go as planned. Whatever your situation, we are here to help with compassion and no judgment.

🏠

Foreclosure

Facing foreclosure? We can move fast to help you avoid losing your home and protect your credit. Time matters and we act quickly.

⚖️

Probate and Inherited Property

We have personally navigated probate after a family loss. We understand the emotional weight and can make the process simple.

💔

Divorce

A fast cash sale removes the stress of a shared asset during an already difficult time. We handle everything so you can move forward.

🔧

Homes Needing Repairs

Do not spend money fixing up a home you want to sell. We buy as is, no matter the condition, saving you time and money.

📦

Relocation

Moving out of state or need to relocate quickly? We can close on your schedule so you can focus on your fresh start.

💰

Financial Hardship

Behind on payments or facing tax liens? A fast cash sale can give you the relief and financial breathing room you need.

About Us

Cobb County Raised. Built on Real Experience.

My name is J Brandon Bey and I have been in real estate since 2018, not as a hobby, but as a lifelong pursuit of understanding how property truly works for families and investors alike.

Cobb County is home. I grew up here since middle school and returning here was never just a business decision, it was personal. I know these neighborhoods, these communities, and the people in them.

I started as an investor and wholesaler across Southern California before expanding to Las Vegas as a real estate agent, one of the most competitive markets in the country. Then life gave me the most personal real estate education possible. After a family loss, I was appointed administrator of my father's probate estate. I did not just study probate real estate. I lived it.

That experience changed how I work. Cobb County Home Buyers exists to give homeowners a direct, personal, and honest path forward.
